description_long: This is a compact, rectangular crossbody grocery bag with a long, adjustable black strap for easy carrying over the shoulder. The main body of the bag is made from a durable, slightly textured fabric in a faded red-orange color, featuring vertical stripes and subtle printed text or graphics. The front flap is secured with a visible black trim and a small rectangular patch, possibly a brand label, near the bottom center. The sides of the bag are narrow, and the back panel continues the striped pattern, giving the bag a cohesive look. The bag appears to be lightweight and flexible, suitable for carrying small groceries or personal items in an urban environment. No visible groceries or contents are present, and the bag maintains a flat, empty appearance.
description: A small, rectangular red-orange crossbody grocery bag with a black adjustable strap and subtle printed graphics. The bag is flat and empty, with a front flap and black trim.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bag's flap, black trim, and a small rectangular label, with the strap extending upward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bag's narrow profile and the thickness of the strap.
description_view_2: Back view displays the full striped pattern and printed text, with no visible branding or flap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slim profile and strap attachment.
attribute_branding_or_logo: small rectangular label on front flap, possible branding
